name: axoniq-app-development
description: Skills for developers building applications with Axon Framework 5: command handling and event-sourced entities, DCB decision models, event handling and processors, query handling, the event store and conversion, messaging foundations, configuration, and testing.

interface.shortDescription: Skills for building applications with Axon Framework 5.
interface.longDescription: A curated plugin of Axon Framework 5 application-development skills: command handling and event-sourced entities, DCB decision models, event handling and processors, query handling, the event store and conversion, messaging foundations, configuration, and testing.
defaultPrompt: Implement a command handler and event-sourced entity in Axon Framework 5.
Set up event handling and a projection in Axon Framework 5.
Configure Axon Framework 5 in a Spring Boot application.
